---
title: "kidsnet_pilot"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)
library(purrr)
```

```{r}
data_path <- "pilot_data"

all_data <- list.files(data_path, pattern = "*.csv", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  map_dfr(~ read_csv(.x, col_types = cols(.default = "c")))
```

```{r}
all_data <- all_data %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id = as.character(participant_id),
    participant_id = str_extract(participant_id, "\\d+"),  # extract numeric part
    participant_id = paste0("p", str_pad(participant_id, 3, pad = "0"))
  )
```

```{r}
grid_trials <- all_data %>%
  filter(trial_type == "emotion-grid")
```

```{r}
extract_final_placements <- function(row) {
  
  if (is.na(row$move_log) || row$move_log == "[]") return(NULL)
  
  parsed <- tryCatch(fromJSON(row$move_log), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(parsed)) return(NULL)
  
  # Must have grid positions
  if (!all(c("grid_col", "grid_row") %in% names(parsed))) return(NULL)
  
  # Detect image column
  img_col <- if ("image_name" %in% names(parsed)) "image_name" else
             if ("image" %in% names(parsed)) "image" else NULL
  
  if (is.null(img_col)) return(NULL)
  
  # If timestamp exists, reconstruct final placement
  if ("timestamp" %in% names(parsed)) {
    
    parsed %>%
      mutate(
        grid_col = as.numeric(grid_col),
        grid_row = as.numeric(grid_row),
        timestamp = as.numeric(timestamp)
      ) %>%
      group_by(.data[[img_col]]) %>%
      arrange(timestamp) %>%
      slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      transmute(
        participant_id = row$participant_id,
        block = as.numeric(row$block),
        trial = as.numeric(row$trial),
        image_name = .data[[img_col]],
        posX = grid_col,
        posY = grid_row
      )
    
  } else {
    
    # If no timestamp, assume already final
    parsed %>%
      transmute(
        participant_id = row$participant_id,
        block = as.numeric(row$block),
        trial = as.numeric(row$trial),
        image_name = .data[[img_col]],
        posX = as.numeric(grid_col),
        posY = as.numeric(grid_row)
      )
  }
}
```

```{r}
final_placements <- grid_trials %>%
  split(seq(nrow(.))) %>%
  map_dfr(~ extract_final_placements(.x)) %>%
  mutate(trial = as.numeric(trial)) %>%
  filter(trial > 0)
```

```{r}
final_placements <- final_placements %>%
  filter(trial != -1)
```

```{r}
final_placements <- final_placements %>%
  mutate(
    category = case_when(
      str_detect(image_name, "happy|sad|angry|fearful|surprise|disgust") ~ "emotion",
      str_detect(image_name,
                 "horse|lion|wolf|fish|squirrel|sheep|peacock|pigeon|fox|butterfly|ladybug|dolphin") ~ "animal",
      str_detect(image_name, 
                 "tree|flower|grass|leaf|apple|broccoli|blueberry|acorn|cherry|cactus|cabbage|peanut") ~ "plant"
    )
  )

final_placements <- final_placements %>%
  mutate(
    set = str_extract(image_name, "_\\d+") %>% 
          str_remove("_"),
    base_name = str_remove(image_name, "_\\d+")
  )
```

```{r}
compute_distance_vector <- function(df) {
  
  coords <- df %>%
    arrange(base_name) %>%
    select(posX, posY) %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  dist_matrix <- as.matrix(dist(coords))
  dist_matrix[upper.tri(dist_matrix)]
}
```

```{r}
dist_data <- final_placements %>%
  group_by(participant_id, category, set) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(dist_vec = map(data, compute_distance_vector)) %>%
  select(-data)
```

```{r}
consistency_results <- dist_data %>%
  group_by(participant_id, category) %>%
  summarise(
    consistency = {
      vecs <- dist_vec
      if (length(vecs) < 2) return(NA_real_)
      
      combs <- combn(seq_along(vecs), 2)
      
      cors <- apply(combs, 2, function(idx) {
        cor(vecs[[idx[1]]], vecs[[idx[2]]], use = "complete.obs")
      })
      
      mean(cors, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
consistency_results
```

```{r}
write.csv(final_placements, "final_placements.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
age_vector <- c(
  5,7,5,4,4,5,5,5,7,5,
  7,7,6,4,5,4,6,5,3,8,
  6,4,4,8,6
)

age_df <- tibble(
  participant_id = paste0("p", str_pad(2:26, 3, pad = "0")),
  age = age_vector
)

consistency_results <- consistency_results %>%
  left_join(age_df, by = "participant_id")
```

```{r}
consistency_results <- consistency_results %>%
  mutate(
    age_group = case_when(
      age <= 4 ~ "3–4",
      age <= 6 ~ "5–6",
      age >= 7 ~ "7–8"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
consistency_summary <- consistency_results %>%
  group_by(age_group, category) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_consistency = mean(consistency, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_consistency = sd(consistency, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

consistency_summary
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(consistency_results,
       aes(x = age_group, y = consistency, fill = category)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Age Group",
    y = "Consistency (Correlation)",
    title = "Semantic Arrangement Consistency by Age Group"
  )
```
